title: Service bicycle wheels and hubs
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Service bicycle wheels and hubs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to service bicycle wheels and hubs

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Research and interpret bicycle manufacturer specifications and service instructions for wheels and hubs1.3 Inspect condition of bicycle wheels and hubs for faults and worn or damaged components using visual inspection methods and comparison of measurements against manufacturer specifications1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.6 Prepare work area and plan work to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Research and interpret bicycle manufacturer specifications and service instructions for wheels and hubs1.3 Inspect condition of bicycle wheels and hubs for faults and worn or damaged components using visual inspection methods and comparison of measurements against manufacturer specifications1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.6 Prepare work area and plan work to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Research and interpret bicycle manufacturer specifications and service instructions for wheels and hubs1.3 Inspect condition of bicycle wheels and hubs for faults and worn or damaged components using visual inspection methods and comparison of measurements against manufacturer specifications1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.6 Prepare work area and plan work to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to service bicycle wheels and hubs

elements.title: Carry out service of wheels and hubs

pcs.text: Remove bicycle wheels according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications2.2 Service wheels and hubs according to work plan, manufacturer specifications, and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Refit serviced wheels and hubs to bicycle and test and adjust as required according to job requirements and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove bicycle wheels according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications2.2 Service wheels and hubs according to work plan, manufacturer specifications, and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Refit serviced wheels and hubs to bicycle and test and adjust as required according to job requirements and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove bicycle wheels according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications2.2 Service wheels and hubs according to work plan, manufacturer specifications, and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Refit serviced wheels and hubs to bicycle and test and adjust as required according to job requirements and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out service of wheels and hubs

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm bicycle is ready for use 3.2 Report problems outside own area of responsibility to required person3.3 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.4 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm bicycle is ready for use 3.2 Report problems outside own area of responsibility to required person3.3 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.4 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm bicycle is ready for use 3.2 Report problems outside own area of responsibility to required person3.3 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.4 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
